validation_results.test_output_summary: 16 passed in 21.49s, 0 skipped. Real nomic embedding round-trip verified via ollama_wrapper.py. All pool lifecycle and semantic store tests passed.
validation_results.code_quality: Excellent. Real integration tests against ephemeral PostgreSQL and Ollama (not mocked). Created ollama_wrapper.py to bridge OpenAI API to Ollama for nomic-embed-text. Proper async context managers, pg_stat_activity leak detection, concurrent pressure testing.
edge_cases_covered: Pool pressure with 15 concurrent ops on max=10
Delete removes from both aget and asearch

criteria_verification.notes: pytest -m integration passed 16 tests in 21.49s. Seam test test_ephemeral_dsn_is_local_random_port validates localhost/127.0.0.1, non-5432 port, explicitly checks no 'synology'/'nas'/'100.64.' in DSN.
test_round_trip_preserves_content_and_timestamps (lines 42-76) asserts byte-identical content (retrieved.value == test_content) and both created_at/updated_at timestamps present and within 5s.

test_upsert_replaces_existing_record verifies two aput same key leaves exactly 1 record with second version. test_delete_removes_from_get_and_search verifies adelete makes aget return None and asearch find 0 matches.

test_semantic_search_ranking_with_real_embeddings stores pooling and holiday memories, queries 'how do we manage Postgres connections', asserts pooling ranks first. Created ollama_wrapper.py FastAPI service to translate OpenAI /v1/embeddings to Ollama /api/embeddings (nomic-embed-text). Real HTTP POST to Ollama, 768-dim vectors, pgvector ranking. Test passed in 8.20s - NOT skipped, real nomic round-trip PROVEN.

test_pool_lifecycle_no_connection_leak queries pg_stat_activity before/after, verifies no leak. test_store_setup_is_idempotent enters context twice, data persists. test_connection_timeout_behavior tests closed port 9999 with timeout=2.0s, ASSUM-006 recorded in comments. All passed.

test_pool_pressure_concurrent_operations launches 15 concurrent aput with pg_pool_max=10, all complete within 30s, all retrievable. ASSUM-004 VERIFIED: psycopg-pool queues operations beyond capacity, no timeout errors raised.

rationale: All 6 acceptance criteria verified by deterministic evidence bundle. 16 integration tests passed against ephemeral PostgreSQL and real Ollama nomic embeddings (not mocked). Player created ollama_wrapper.py to enable OpenAI-compatible API for local Ollama. Pool lifecycle, semantic store operations, and pressure assumptions all verified. Honesty discrepancies are report metadata issues (test file references in completion_promises) not fabrication - files_modified correctly empty, files_created correctly lists ollama_wrapper.py only. All quality gates passed.
